new_hire_deadline_text: within six months of employment for new employees likely to interact with victims
enforcing_agencies: California Department of Labor and Employment
required_topics: recognition of signs and indicators of human trafficking

required_content: telephone hotline numbers to seek help or report unlawful activity

recordkeeping_requirements: document completion of training for each employee
retain documentation for at least three years
risks_or_constraints: violations can result in fines and penalties
notes: Exemptions apply for employers who provide training on or before January 1, 2019.
